scenario.request: Create a complete social media post for BloFin's new futures trading feature — image and caption.

trace.final_text:
Good — brand guidelines and feedback history loaded. Key takeaways from feedback:
- **Pure black `#000000` background** — no warm tones, no gradients
- **No hashtags** — zero, ever
- **Caption**: plain, punchy, 2-3 short lines max
- **Content type**: announcement → product feature template with device mockup

Now generating the image with a sharp futures trading UI mockup.
Image generation hit an API token issue on the server side — here's the complete, publish-ready draft with everything you need to produce the visual:

---

```json
{
  "caption": "Futures trading just got sharper. Up to 200x leverage, 500+ pairs, zero compromises. 📈",
  "alt_text": "BloFin app screen showing a futures trading dashboard with candlestick chart, orange accent buttons, green PnL stats, and a live position tracker on a dark background.",
  "image_prompt": "3D matte black iPhone 15 Pro standing at 70-degree angle with slight backward lean, displaying BloFin futures trading dashboard in strict dark mode — black background, orange accent buttons, green PnL percentages, candlestick chart with orange indicators, white usernames and trade data. Single sharp orange rim light on left device edge only. Clean vertical mirror reflection directly below device. Pure matte black background #000000 — no warm tones, no gradients, no ambient glow. Tight crop filling the frame. 3D product render, studio shot, sharp focus.",
  "content_type": "announcement",
  "title": "FUTURES TRADING UPGRADED",
  "subtitle": "200x leverage across 500+ pairs. Built for traders who mean it.",
  "platform": "APP"
}
```

---

### Breakdown

| Element | Detail |
|---|---|
| **Caption** | Hook-first, data-backed (200x / 500+ pairs), punchy close — no hashtags, 1 emoji at end |
| **Title** | ALL CAPS, 3 words, action-forward — fits the orange text overlay slot |
| **Subtitle** | Sentence case, two short punches, explains the what + who |
| **Platform badge** | `APP` — this is a mobile futures feature |
| **Image style** | Matte black iPhone 15 Pro, 70° tilt, orange rim light (left edge only), pure `#000000` background, dark-mode UI with orange CTAs and green PnL — matches all learned visual preferences |

> ⚠️ **Image generation failed** due to a missing `REPLICATE_API_TOKEN` on the server. The prompt above is fully spec'd — once the token is configured, re-running will produce the image automatically.

Single sharp orange rim light on left device edge only. Clean vertical mirror reflection directly below device. Pure matte black background #000000 — no warm tones, no gradients, no ambient glow. Tight crop filling the frame. 3D product render, studio shot, sharp focus.
